---
title: "error_merqury_exploration"
output: html_document
date: "2025-12-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
```



```{r cars}
# procesar_switch_errors_baseR.R
dir_path <- "."

files <- list.files(dir_path, pattern = "\\.switch\\.bed\\.errors$", full.names = TRUE)
files
```


```{r cars}
# resultado vacío
res <- data.frame(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

for (f in files) {
  lines <- readLines(f, warn = FALSE)
  lines <- trimws(lines)
  lines <- lines[lines != ""]            # quitar líneas vacías

  # contenedores para los conteos
  counts <- list(long = 0, same = 0, short = 0, switchback = 0)

  for (ln in lines) {
    # capturar número y palabra (maneja espacios irregulares y comas en números)
    m <- regexec("^\\s*([0-9,]+)\\s+([A-Za-z]+)", ln)
    parts <- regmatches(ln, m)[[1]]
    if (length(parts) >= 3) {
      cnt <- as.numeric(gsub(",", "", parts[2]))
      cls <- tolower(parts[3])

      # normalizar a las 4 categorías buscadas
      if (grepl("long", cls)) {
        counts$long <- counts$long + cnt
      } else if (grepl("^same$|\\bsame\\b", cls)) {
        counts$same <- counts$same + cnt
      } else if (grepl("short", cls)) {
        counts$short <- counts$short + cnt
      } else if (grepl("switch", cls)) {
        counts$switchback <- counts$switchback + cnt
      } else {
        # si aparece una clase inesperada, la ignoramos (o podrías guardarla)
      }
    }
  }

  fname <- basename(f)
  dataset <- regmatches(fname, regexpr("hg[0-9]+", fname))
  haplotype <- if (grepl("hap[AB]", fname, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    regmatches(fname, regexpr("hap[AB]", fname, ignore.case = TRUE))
  } else NA_character_

  method <- if (grepl("hifiasm", fname, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    "hifiasm"
  } else if (grepl("rfhap|rfhao", fname, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    "rfhap"
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }

  row <- data.frame(
    file = fname,
    dataset = ifelse(length(dataset) > 0, dataset, NA_character_),
    haplotype = ifelse(length(haplotype) > 0, haplotype, NA_character_),
    method = method,
    long = counts$long,
    same = counts$same,
    short = counts$short,
    switchback = counts$switchback,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  res <- rbind(res, row)
}

# ordenar columnas y reemplazar NA por ""
res[is.na(res)] <- ""
res <- res[, c("file", "dataset", "haplotype", "method", "long", "same", "short", "switchback")]

# guardar resultados
out_wide <- file.path(dir_path, "summary_switch_errors.csv")
write.csv(res, out_wide, row.names = FALSE)

# crear versión "larga" (una fila por tipo de error) usando base R
res_long_list <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(res)), function(i) {
  data.frame(
    file = res$file[i],
    dataset = res$dataset[i],
    haplotype = res$haplotype[i],
    method = res$method[i],
    error_type = c("long", "same", "short", "switchback"),
    count = as.numeric(res[i, c("long", "same", "short", "switchback")]),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})
res_long <- do.call(rbind, res_long_list)

out_long <- file.path(dir_path, "summary_switch_errors_long.csv")
write.csv(res_long, out_long, row.names = FALSE)

# mostrar resumen corto en consola
print(res)
cat("\nSaved:\n -", out_wide, "\n -", out_long, "\n")

```


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}

# recodificar haplotypes a etiquetas biológicas
res$hap_label <- ifelse(res$haplotype == "hapA", "Maternal", "Paternal")

# paleta manual
cols <- c(
  "hifiasm" = "#2C7FB8",  # azul medianamente oscuro
  "rfhap"   = "#F28E2B"   # damasco normal
)

cols_light <- c(
  "hifiasm" = "#9ECAE1",  # azul claro
  "rfhap"   = "#FDB863"  # damasco claro
)

# barplot
p_long <- ggplot(
  res,
  aes(
    x = hap_label,
    y = long,
    fill = method
  )
) +
  geom_col(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    width = 0.7
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ dataset) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Set2") +
  labs(
    x = "Haplotype",
    y = "Number of Long switch errors"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

p_long

```
```{r}
# barplot
p_short <- ggplot(
  res,
  aes(
    x = hap_label,
    y = short,
    fill = method
  )
) +
  geom_col(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    width = 0.7
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ dataset) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Set2")  +
  labs(
    x = "Haplotype",
    y = "Number of Short switch errors"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

p_short
```

```{r}
library(patchwork)

png("Suplementary_figure_5.png", width = 1000, height = 800, res = 120)
(p_long | p_short) + plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")
dev.off()
```
